meta.title: LemonSpace - Visual workspace for creative teams
meta.description: A visual canvas where your brand assets become campaigns. Upload, edit, organize, compare, and export in one place. Self-hosted and source-available.

headline.before: The visual workspace where your brand assets become

hero.subheadline: Upload your assets, organize them on a node-based canvas, compare variants, and export campaign-ready results — all in one place. AI generation is optional when you need it.

proof.title: Canvas-first
proof.desc: Assets, prompts, variants, and exports stay visibly connected.

proof.title: No lock-ins
proof.desc: Planned self-hosting, source-available code, and EU-ready setups.

canvas.promptText: Spring campaign — product on pastel yellow, soft daylight, 4 variants in square & 4:5.

events.text: Variant 7 is ready — where is it? ▸ Tab 2
The brief was in another tool …
Photoshop is hanging. File not saved.

items.title: Tab roulette.
items.desc: Something needs your attention. Is it tab three? Tab five? You click through eight tabs trying to find the one that is calling for you. By the time you find it, another tool has already crashed.

items.title: No comparison.
items.desc: You made twelve variants, but they are scattered across folders, chats, and downloads. Comparing them means opening six windows side by side and hoping you do not lose track.

items.title: Your brand, their server.
items.desc: Every asset, edit, and variant lives on someone else's infrastructure. When confidentiality matters, that is often hard to justify to legal.

manifesto.label: The answer
manifesto.subheadline: LemonSpace brings your visual workflow onto one board — upload, organize, edit non-destructively, run agent workflows, compare results, and export. Optional AI generation only when you need it.

how.label: How it works
how.headline: From idea to campaign in minutes.
how.subheadline: Four steps, one canvas. Every status visible right on the node. No global spinners, no blocking modals.

canvas.promptText: "…on pastel yellow, 4 variants, soft light."

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Drop your brand assets and reference images onto the canvas. Tag them and keep your library cleanly organized.

steps.title: Build workflow
steps.desc: Connect nodes for organization, editing, transformation, and comparison. Add AI generation only when something new is actually missing.

steps.title: Refine
steps.desc: Adjust curves, color, and light non-destructively. Run agent workflows, review results, and keep control at every step.

steps.title: Export
steps.desc: Pick winners, export to your campaign formats, and ship. Web, social, and print presets — defined once, reused forever.

features.label: What LemonSpace actually does
features.headline: Six tools. One canvas. Your data stays with you.

items.title: Your workflow on one surface.
items.desc: A node-based canvas with drag and drop. Connect, branch, and rearrange assets, edits, and transformations. The canvas is the project file.

items.title: One source of truth.
items.desc: Organize brand assets, references, and approved templates in one shared library. Tag, version, and reuse them on every canvas.

items.title: Adjustment stack — like Photoshop, but as nodes.
items.desc: Adjust curves, color, light, and detail directly on the canvas. Every edit is non-destructive, reorderable, branchable, and leaves the original untouched.

items.title: You define the goal — the agent plans.
items.desc: Connect an Agent node for multi-step creative jobs. Review the plan, adjust parameters, and ship. Skeleton nodes appear before the first API call runs.

items.title: Side by side. Then ZIP.
items.desc: Review variants with an interactive slider, choose winners, and export to web, social, and print presets. Define once, reuse for every campaign.

items.title: When the library is not enough.
items.desc: Connect an AI image node to your brief and choose a model — Gemini 2.5 Flash, FLUX.2, GPT-5 Image. The output is a normal asset node. One step among many.

hosting.label: Self-Hosted · Source-Available
hosting.headline: Your brand. Your servers. Your rules.
hosting.subheadline: LemonSpace runs on your own infrastructure — Docker, Kubernetes, or bare metal. Brand assets, workflows, generated variants: none of it has to leave your servers.

bullets.title: One docker-compose.yml.
bullets.desc: Next.js, Convex, Redis, rembg, Real-ESRGAN, GFPGAN.

bullets.title: BSL 1.1, three-year change date.
bullets.desc: Then automatically Apache 2.0. No bait and switch.

bullets.title: Self-hosted AI included.
bullets.desc: Background removal, upscaling, face restoration — all without credits.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple, credit-based pricing.
pricing.info: Credits power AI generation, agent runs, and premium models. Editing, organization, comparison, export, background removal, and upscaling are always included — no credits.

waitlist.label: Early Access
waitlist.privacyNote: No spam. We'll email you when the beta opens.
waitlist.success: You are on the list. Thank you.
waitlist.already: You are already on the waitlist.
waitlist.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.ctaSub: We're building LemonSpace for creative teams who want one place for their visual workflow — from brand assets to the finished campaign. We'll let you know as soon as the beta opens.

footer.tagline: Visual workspace for small creative teams. In active development. Self-hosted and source-available as soon as the code is public.
